regulation_clause.text: Regulated entities must update KYC records in the Central KYC Records Registry within 7 days of receiving updated information from a customer.

instance.gold_rationale: MO-2 changes "IF WS-TODAY-DAY > WS-DUE-DAY MOVE 'OVERDUE' TO WS-STATUS ELSE MOVE 'OK' TO WS-STATUS END-IF." to "MOVE 'OK' TO WS-STATUS." at KYCSYNC3:2000-CHK:20-20, producing D2_missing_rule.

provenance.mutation: MO-2; locus=KYCSYNC3:2000-CHK:20-20; old="IF WS-TODAY-DAY > WS-DUE-DAY MOVE 'OVERDUE' TO WS-STATUS ELSE MOVE 'OK' TO WS-STATUS END-IF."; new="MOVE 'OK' TO WS-STATUS."; validation=compiled; diversify=deterministic

judgement.reason: The unconditional MOVE 'OK' makes the computed due date and current date irrelevant, which is inconsistent with the stated seven-day control and resembles an artificial removal of the check. However, an incomplete or stubbed validation paragraph is also plausible in real legacy COBOL.

regulation_clause.text: The instructions/Directions on KYC/AML/CFT issued by RBI from time to time shall be strictly adhered to in respect of all cards issued, including co-branded cards.

instance.gold_rationale: MO-4 changes 'D' to 'W' at CLOSPEN3:WSDAYBAS.cpy:8-8, producing D4_stale_reference_data.

provenance.mutation: MO-4; locus=CLOSPEN3:WSDAYBAS.cpy:8-8; old='D'; new='W'; validation=compiled; diversify=deterministic

judgement.reason: The 88-level condition is syntactically plausible COBOL, and overlapping C/W values could intentionally denote accrual under either supported day basis. However, it is semantically redundant and the name is not clearly supported by the surrounding declarations; the supplied KYC/AML/CFT clause provides no direct linkage. Either legacy drift or an artificial broadening is therefore possible.

regulation_clause.text: If a complainant does not get a satisfactory response within a maximum period of 30 days from lodging the complaint, they may approach the RBI Ombudsman.

instance.gold_rationale: MO-0 applies only benign surface variation at GRVAGE2:1000-MAIN:13-13; the regulatory behavior is unchanged.

provenance.mutation: MO-0; locus=GRVAGE2:1000-MAIN:13-13; old="DISPLAY 'ESCALATE: ' WS-ESCALATE"; new="DISPLAY 'ESCALATE= ' WS-ESCALATE"; validation=compiled; diversify=deterministic

judgement.reason: The highlighted DISPLAY statement is a plausible legacy diagnostic/output change, but it has no effect on the 30-day decision. The actual regulatory drift is the separate boundary condition WS-DAYS-OPEN > 30, which escalates only after day 30.

regulation_clause.text: For partnership firms, the beneficial owner is the natural person with ownership of/entitlement to more than 10 percent of capital or profits (lowered from 15 percent by the 2023-10-17 amendment to the 2016 MD).

instance.gold_rationale: MO-0 applies only benign surface variation at BOIDENT3:1000-MAIN:17-17; the regulatory behavior is unchanged.

provenance.mutation: MO-0; locus=BOIDENT3:1000-MAIN:17-17; old="DISPLAY 'BO: ' WS-IS-BO"; new="DISPLAY 'BO= ' WS-IS-BO"; validation=compiled; diversify=deterministic
